title: Lead SEO Specialist at Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates:
Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates!
